---
name: Adapter request
about: Request support for a new AI coding tool
title: "Adapter: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Tool name
The name of the AI coding tool.

## Debris location
Where does this tool store its worktrees, caches, or logs?

- Base path: `~/.<tool-name>/...`
- Contents: worktrees, caches, logs, or other?

## Category
What category does this debris belong to?
- worktree (git worktrees from AI coding sessions)
- node_modules
- build-cache
- other-cache
- ai-logs

## Additional context
Any other relevant details about this tool and its debris.
